# mxroute_verification_key (Data Source)

Fetches the account ownership-verification record from the MXroute account — the verification key and the DNS record to publish to prove ownership.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) A human-readable description of the verification record.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the verification key.
- `key` (String) The account verification key.
- `record` (Attributes) The DNS record to publish to verify account ownership. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--record))

<a id="nestedatt--record"></a>
### Nested Schema for `record`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The DNS record name.
- `type` (String) The DNS record type.
- `value` (String) The DNS record value.
